verses.textZhHant: 你要專心仰賴耶和華，不可倚靠自己的聰明；在你一切所行的事上都要認定他，他必指引你的路。
verses.textEn: Trust in Yahweh with all your heart, and do not lean on your own understanding. In all your ways acknowledge him, and he will make your paths straight.
verses.shortCantoneseReflection: 今日唔需要樣樣都靠自己，先交託畀主。

verses.textZhHant: 耶和華是我的牧者，我必不致缺乏。
verses.textEn: Yahweh is my shepherd: I shall lack nothing.
verses.shortCantoneseReflection: 主唔單止知道你需要乜，佢亦會看顧你。

verses.textZhHant: 我雖然行過死蔭的幽谷，也不怕遭害，因為你與我同在；你的杖，你的竿，都安慰我。
verses.textEn: Even though I walk through the valley of the shadow of death, I will fear no evil, for you are with me. Your rod and your staff, they comfort me.
verses.shortCantoneseReflection: 黑暗未必即刻離開，但主會陪你一齊行過。

verses.textZhHant: 應當一無掛慮，只要凡事藉著禱告、祈求，和感謝，將你們所要的告訴神。神所賜出人意外的平安，必在基督耶穌裡保守你們的心懷意念。
verses.textEn: In nothing be anxious, but in everything, by prayer and petition with thanksgiving, let your requests be made known to God. The peace of God, which surpasses all understanding, will guard your hearts and your thoughts in Christ Jesus.
verses.shortCantoneseReflection: 焦慮唔需要先消失，你可以帶住真實心情去祈禱。

verses.textZhHant: 你不要害怕，因為我與你同在；不要驚惶，因為我是你的神。我必堅固你，我必幫助你，我必用我公義的右手扶持你。
verses.textEn: Do not be afraid, for I am with you. Do not be dismayed, for I am your God. I will strengthen you. Yes, I will help you. Yes, I will uphold you with the right hand of my righteousness.
verses.shortCantoneseReflection: 主唔單止叫你唔好怕，仲應許親自扶住你。

verses.textZhHant: 耶和華說：我知道我向你們所懷的意念，是賜平安的意念，不是降災禍的意念，要叫你們末後有指望。
verses.textEn: For I know the thoughts that I think toward you, says Yahweh, thoughts of peace, and not of evil, to give you hope and a future.
verses.shortCantoneseReflection: 前路未明朗都唔代表冇方向，主仍然有盼望畀你。

verses.textZhHant: 我們曉得萬事都互相效力，叫愛神的人得益處，就是按他旨意被召的人。
verses.textEn: We know that all things work together for good for those who love God, to those who are called according to his purpose.
verses.shortCantoneseReflection: 你未必而家睇得明，但神可以將碎片拼成祝福。

verses.textZhHant: 凡勞苦擔重擔的人，可以到我這裡來，我就使你們得安息。
verses.textEn: Come to me, all you who labor and are heavily burdened, and I will give you rest.
verses.shortCantoneseReflection: 攰嘅時候唔係輸咗，係時候返到主面前安歇。

verses.textZhHant: 你們要休息，要知道我是神。
verses.textEn: Be still, and know that I am God.
verses.shortCantoneseReflection: 今日先停低一下，讓心慢返落嚟，記得神仍然掌權。

verses.textZhHant: 我豈沒有吩咐你嗎？你當剛強壯膽！不要懼怕，也不要驚惶，因為你無論往哪裡去，耶和華你的神必與你同在。
verses.textEn: Haven't I commanded you? Be strong and courageous. Do not be afraid. Do not be dismayed, for Yahweh your God is with you wherever you go.
verses.shortCantoneseReflection: 你要面對嘅唔容易，但主同行，所以可以剛強。

verses.textZhHant: 信就是所望之事的實底，是未見之事的確據。
verses.textEn: Now faith is assurance of things hoped for, proof of things not seen.
verses.shortCantoneseReflection: 未見到答案，都可以先踏出一步，因為信心係對主嘅把握。

verses.textZhHant: 我要向山舉目；我的幫助從何而來？我的幫助從造天地的耶和華而來。
verses.textEn: I will lift up my eyes to the hills. Where does my help come from? My help comes from Yahweh, who made heaven and earth.
verses.shortCantoneseReflection: 當你搵幫助，記得真正扶持你嘅係造天地嘅主。

verses.textZhHant: 耶和華是我的亮光，是我的拯救，我還怕誰呢？耶和華是我性命的保障，我還懼誰呢？
verses.textEn: Yahweh is my light and my salvation. Whom shall I fear? Yahweh is the strength of my life. Of whom shall I be afraid?
verses.shortCantoneseReflection: 驚係真實，但神嘅同在比恐懼更真。

verses.textZhHant: 我們不致消滅，是出於耶和華諸般的慈愛；是因他的憐憫不致斷絕。每早晨，這都是新的；你的誠實極其廣大！
verses.textEn: It is because of Yahweh's loving kindnesses that we are not consumed, because his compassion doesn't fail. They are new every morning. Great is your faithfulness.
verses.shortCantoneseReflection: 即使昨日沉重，今日仍然有新嘅憐憫等緊你。

verses.textZhHant: 世人哪，耶和華已指示你何為善。他向你所要的是甚麼呢？只要你行公義，好憐憫，存謙卑的心，與你的神同行。
verses.textEn: He has shown you, O man, what is good. What does Yahweh require of you, but to act justly, to love mercy, and to walk humbly with your God?
verses.shortCantoneseReflection: 跟主同行唔係複雜公式，而係每日忠心、憐憫、謙卑。

verses.textZhHant: 我留下平安給你們；我將我的平安賜給你們。我所賜的，不像世人所賜的。你們心裡不要憂愁，也不要膽怯。
verses.textEn: Peace I leave with you. My peace I give to you; not as the world gives, give I to you. Don't let your heart be troubled, neither let it be fearful.
verses.shortCantoneseReflection: 主賜嘅平安唔係環境順利先有，而係心裡被主托住。

verses.textZhHant: 你所做的，要交託耶和華，你所謀的，就必成立。
verses.textEn: Commit your deeds to Yahweh, and your plans shall succeed.
verses.shortCantoneseReflection: 計劃重要，但先交託畀主，方向先會穩。

verses.textZhHant: 你的話是我腳前的燈，是我路上的光。
verses.textEn: Your word is a lamp to my feet, and a light for my path.
verses.shortCantoneseReflection: 神未必一次過照亮全部，但足夠照到你下一步。

verses.textZhHant: 你們要先求他的國和他的義，這些東西都要加給你們了。
verses.textEn: But seek first God's Kingdom and his righteousness; and all these things will be given to you as well.
verses.shortCantoneseReflection: 先擺正主喺生命中心，其餘嘅事會有次序。

verses.textZhHant: 住在至高者隱密處的，必住在全能者的蔭下。我要論到耶和華說：他是我的避難所，是我的山寨，是我的神，是我所倚靠的。
verses.textEn: He who dwells in the secret place of the Most High will rest in the shadow of the Almighty. I will say of Yahweh, He is my refuge and my fortress; my God, in whom I trust.
verses.shortCantoneseReflection: 世界可以亂，但主仍然係你最穩陣嘅避難所。

verses.textZhHant: 但願使人有盼望的神，因信將諸般的喜樂、平安充滿你們的心，使你們藉著聖靈的能力大有盼望。
verses.textEn: Now may the God of hope fill you with all joy and peace in believing, that you may abound in hope, in the power of the Holy Spirit.
verses.shortCantoneseReflection: 盼望唔係硬撐，而係由神親自將平安放入你心裡。

verses.textZhHant: 堅心倚賴你的，你必保守他十分平安，因為他倚靠你。
verses.textEn: You will keep whoever's mind is steadfast in perfect peace, because he trusts in you.
verses.shortCantoneseReflection: 心唔定嘅時候，先收返目光去信靠主，平安會慢慢落返嚟。

verses.textZhHant: 我曾尋求耶和華，他就應允我，救我脫離一切恐懼。
verses.textEn: I sought Yahweh, and he answered me, and delivered me from all my fears.
verses.shortCantoneseReflection: 恐懼唔一定即刻走，但當你呼求主，佢會先托住你。

verses.textZhHant: 你要把你的重擔卸給耶和華，他必撫養你；他永不叫義人動搖。
verses.textEn: Cast your burden on Yahweh, and he will sustain you. He will never allow the righteous to be moved.
verses.shortCantoneseReflection: 唔好淨係拎住件重擔行，今日試下真係交落去。

verses.textZhHant: 我必安然躺下睡覺，因為獨有你耶和華使我安然居住。
verses.textEn: In peace I will both lay myself down and sleep, for you, Yahweh alone, make me live in safety.
verses.shortCantoneseReflection: 今晚唔需要帶住全部壓力瞓，主仍然看守你。

verses.textZhHant: 又要叫基督的平安在你們心裡作主；你們也為此蒙召，歸為一體；且要存感謝的心。
verses.textEn: Let the peace of Christ rule in your hearts, to which you were also called in one body; and be thankful.
verses.shortCantoneseReflection: 今日唔好俾混亂領住你，俾基督嘅平安作主。

verses.textZhHant: 耶和華必賜力量給他的百姓；耶和華必賜平安的福給他的百姓。
verses.textEn: Yahweh will give strength to his people. Yahweh will bless his people with peace.
verses.shortCantoneseReflection: 主唔只安慰你，仲會俾你有力繼續行。

verses.textZhHant: 我將這些事告訴你們，是要叫你們在我裡面有平安。在世上你們有苦難；但你們可以放心，我已經勝了世界。
verses.textEn: I have told you these things, so that in me you may have peace. In the world you have oppression; but cheer up, I have overcome the world.
verses.shortCantoneseReflection: 平安唔代表冇苦難，而係喺苦難入面知道主已得勝。

verses.textZhHant: 我將耶和華常擺在我面前；因他在我右邊，我便不致搖動。
verses.textEn: I have set Yahweh always before me. Because he is at my right hand, I shall not be moved.
verses.shortCantoneseReflection: 當你記得主喺你旁邊，心會穩返好多。

verses.textZhHant: 你們要將一切的憂慮卸給神，因為他顧念你們。
verses.textEn: Casting all your worries on him, because he cares for you.
verses.shortCantoneseReflection: 你所掛住嘅，主唔覺得煩，因為佢真係顧念你。

verses.textZhHant: 當將你的事交託耶和華，並倚靠他，他就必成全。
verses.textEn: Commit your way to Yahweh. Trust also in him, and he will do this.
verses.shortCantoneseReflection: 唔好淨係諗，今日將你行緊嘅路正式交俾主。

verses.textZhHant: 人心憂慮，屈而不伸；一句良言，使心歡樂。
verses.textEn: Anxiety in a man's heart weighs it down, but a kind word makes it glad.
verses.shortCantoneseReflection: 一句合宜嘅說話可以托起個心，今日都容許神同你講說話。
